column6: ASD, ADHD and Dyslexia. Shy and anxious until she is comfortable and feels safe.

Jack has dyslexia he will struggle to read from script but if verbally told he will remember. Issues with fainting, will go grey, need to sit down stomach pain headache. Low blood sugar treat with full fat pop sugary snack
Sam has autism and dyscalculia., anxiety. He is on the CAT programme at Dance City and will happily dance in front of a packed theatre but struggles to make friends.
Fen has ASD and ADHD and anxiety. This does not affect his cognitive ability.

Heidi has an issue with her right foot (currently under a consultant - may need an operation) it can mainly cause pain and discomfort but she manages this well.
She is currently being assessed by the language and communication team.  She can be shy when meeting new people and lack confidence but is very excited to give your camp a go.
No medical conditions.Emily did attend Act2Cam a couple of years ago
Has slight social and communication needs
ADHD (takes methylphenidate (ritalin) on school days). Very mild asthma and nasal allergies
Autism and ADHD he is on medication for ADHD.
